scripts.dev:all: concurrently --names "SERVER,STORE,LANDING" --prefix-colors "yellow,cyan,magenta" "npm run server:dev --prefix vinyl-store" "npm run dev --prefix vinyl-store" "npm run dev:3002 --prefix vinyl-store/landing-vinyl"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix vinyl-store && npm install --prefix vinyl-store/landing-vinyl
